multimedia.caption: Paddy Tells Arman: ‘Stop Eating And Fight!’

fullArticle:
Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) is just a couple of days in front of its UFC 329 mixed martial arts (MMA) event on Paramount+, set for Sat., July 11, 2026 at T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas, Nevada. With the inclusion of UFC mega-star Conor McGregor, this weekend’s fight card (see it here) is shaping up to be one of the biggest spectacles of the year.

It has some pretty stiff competition from the UFC White House show back in June.

Speaking of the White House, there’s a pretty good chance U.S. President Donald Trump will be in attendance for McGregor’s first fight in five years. According to BetOnline.ag, the betting line is -500 for YES and +300 for NO. Trump is a regular attendee at UFC events as a result of his friendship with promotion CEO Dana White.
